title: Gold Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Gold Squadron''' was the name of several [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[squadron]]s in operation throughout [[The galaxy|galactic]] history:

==Canon==
*'''[[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Gold Squadron]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] and [[New Republic]] starfighter squadron that participated at the [[Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor]]
*'''[[Gold Squadron (Galactic Republic)|Gold Squadron]]''', [[Galactic Republic]] starfighter squadron during the [[Clone Wars]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Gold Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Gold Squadron]]''', [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]] and participated in the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Clone Wars)|Battle of Boz Pity]]
*'''[[Gold Squadron (Nharwaak)|Gold Squadron]]''', the [[Nharwaak]] squadron which fought against the [[Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Gold Squadron (B-wing)|Gold Squadron]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] squadron during the [[Galactic Civil War]]
*'''[[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]]''', a Rebel Alliance squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and the [[Battle of Saijo]]
*'''[[Gold Squadron (New Republic)|Gold Squadron]]''', [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] squadron that participated in the [[Battle of Folor]] and the [[Battle for the Katana fleet]]
*'''[[Gold Squadron (New Jedi Order)|Gold Squadron]]''', New Jedi Order squadron that participated in the [[Operation Shieldfall|Battle on Nam Chorios]]

{{Disambig}}
